mapper.sql: SELECT f.id, f.status, f.creation_time, f.update_time, requester.id AS requester_id, requester.email AS requester_email, requester.username AS requester_username, recipient.id AS recipient_id, recipient.email AS recipient_email, recipient.username AS recipient_username FROM friendships f JOIN users requester ON requester.id = f.requester_user_id JOIN users recipient ON recipient.id = f.recipient_user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friendships ( requester_user_id, recipient_user_id, status, creation_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{requester.id}, #{recipient.id}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE friendships SET requester_user_id = #{requester.id}, recipient_user_id = #{recipient.id}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: WHERE (f.requester_user_id = #{userIdA} AND f.recipient_user_id = #{userIdB}) OR (f.requester_user_id = #{userIdB} AND f.recipient_user_id = #{userIdA})
WHERE f.status = 'ACCEPTED' AND (f.requester_user_id = #{userId} OR f.recipient_user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY f.update_time DESC, f.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM friendships WHERE status = 'ACCEPTED' AND ( (requester_user_id = #{userIdA} AND recipient_user_id = #{userIdB}) OR (requester_user_id = #{userIdB} AND recipient_user_id = #{userIdA}) )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM friendships WHERE status = 'ACCEPTED' AND ( (requester_user_id = #{userIdA} AND recipient_user_id = #{userIdB}) OR (requester_user_id = #{userIdB} AND recipient_user_id = #{userIdA}) )
